zh.lifeSummary: Ann Edwards於1567年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾金也斯 斯坦利。她於1587年與Samuel Allen在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1649年8月5日在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德溫莎女爵享年82歲。

nameMeanings.name: Edwards
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Edward , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

History: One of the earliest American bearers of this very common English surname was William Edwards, the son of Rev. Richard Edwards, a London clergyman in the age of Elizabeth I, who came to New England c. 1640. His descendant Jonathan (1703–58), of East Windsor, CT, was a prominent Congregational clergyman whose New England theology led to the first Great Awakening, a great religious revival.

variants.name: Edward
meanings: English and Welsh: from the Middle English personal name Edward (Old English Ēadweard, from ēad ‘prosperity, fortune’ + w(e)ard ‘guard, ward’). The popularity of the personal name was largely due to its being the name of the sainted Anglo-Saxon king Edward the Confessor and of three kings in the 13th–14th centuries.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

en.lifeSummary: Ann Edwards was born in 1567, in King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. She married Samuel Allen in 1587, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died on 5 August 1649, in Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 82.

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Edwards(은)는 1567년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 킨그'스 스탠리에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1587년 영국에서 Samuel Allen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1649년 8월 5일 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 윈드소르에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Ann Edwards родилась в 1567 г. в местности кинг'с стэнли, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Samuel Allen в 1587 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла 5 августа 1649 г. в местности виндзор, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 82 лет.
